news.t: Dimensional Lists Four Fixed Income ETFs and Announces Further Expansion of ETF Offering

overview.description: The Dimensional Short-Duration Fixed Income ETF (DFSD) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund is an actively managed ETF that provides broad exposure to investment-grade debt securities with short duration. DFSD was launched on Nov 15, 2021 and is issued by Dimensional.

data.title: Dimensional launches 4 bond ETFs, files for 10 equity ETFs. Co-CEO talks the push
data.text: Dimensional Funds co-CEO Gerard O'Reilly and ETF Store President Nate Geraci discuss Dimensional's new ETF launches and investors chasing customizaiton.

data.title: We're telling our clients to look long-term, says Dimensional Funds' Gerard O'Reilly
data.text: Gerard O'Reilly, Dimensional Funds, joins the 'Halftime Report' to discuss where to invest in 2022.

data.title: Dimensional Lists Four Fixed Income ETFs and Announces Further Expansion of ETF Offering
data.text: AUSTIN, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Dimensional Fund Advisors listed today four active transparent fixed income ETFs and filed a preliminary registration statement for 10 equity ETFs.
